name: Sweet Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and raisins in a jar.
2. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least overnight, preferably longer (up to two or three days) for peak sweetness.
3. Before using, shake the jar vigorously.
4. The milk should be an ivory color. Strain it through a fine mesh sieve or cheesecloth to remove the raisins, which will be mushy and flat tasting.
5. Use the strained milk as directed in your recipe.
